name: Hachi-Ban Co., Ltd.
summary: Hachi-Ban Co., Ltd. engages in the restaurant management business. The company also produces and sells food products, and soups and extracts; and sells, imports, and exports foods and seasonings. In addition, it is involved in the restaurant franchise and property letting business. As of January 21, 2021, it operated 134 stores in Japan and 144 stores internationally. The company was founded in 1971 and is headquartered in Kanazawa, Japan.
